titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the East Asia Library, Yale University, Records
East Asia Library, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 5, 2020 at 08:38

did.unittitle: East Asia Library, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, reports, and personnel files of the East Asia Library, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-D (YRG 32-D), Records of Yale school and departmental libraries and collections.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the East Asia Library, 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See finding aid for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: East Asia Library, Yale University, Records (RU 1072). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, reports, and personnel files of the East Asia Library, Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by subject.

did.unittitle: East Asian Libraries in U.S. and Vital Statistics
CALRFE (Com. on Amer. Lib. Resources on the Far East)
Far Eastern Libraries in the U.S.
Japan - U.S. Friendship Commission (10 university consortium)
American Library Association/Assoc. of College and Research Lib/Assoc. for Asian Studies
U.S. Japan Conference on Cultural and Educational Interchange (CULCON)
East Coast East Asian Lib. Consortium
East Asian Studies Library Advisory Committee
Conference on National Planning for Japanese Libraries
Automation Conference(ACLS -American Council of Learned Societies)
Yale Research Guide to East Asian Studies (Linda Lin Chang's report)
NPTA(Nat. Planning Team for Academic Japanese Libraries)(Hoover Conference)
National Institute of Japanese Literature Tokyo
American Library Assoc.---Library Resources and Technical Services (ALA-LRTS)
ARL Foreign Acquisitions Project For Japanese Materials
East Asian Collections - Chinese and Japanese Catg. - Cooperative
Bibliographical Guide to Chinese Works (1898-1937 by Fairbank and Liu)
Custody and Scope of the Collection
National Planning Team for Academic Japanese Libraries
Reappraisal of Japanese Collections inWestern Countries
Surveys, Japanese Acquisitions Survey, Survey Reports
